dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 12, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**MLB Recap: Guardians Edge Angels, Yankees Dominate Orioles**

The Cleveland Guardians edged the Los Angeles Angels 3-2, with Slade Cecconi leading the way for the Guardians, pitching 4.0 innings of scoreless baseball, striking out 7 and walking 1. Angel Martínez and Vaughn Grissom were key contributors for the Angels, with Martínez homering and Grissom hitting his 2nd home run of the season.

The New York Yankees dominated the Baltimore Orioles 6-2, with Will Warren pitching 5.2 innings of quality baseball, striking out 6 and walking 1. Trent Grisham was the big hitter for the Yankees, homering and driving in 3 runs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Slade Cecconi: 4.0 IP, 7 K, 0 ER, 1 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Angel Martínez: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: Cleveland Guardians edge Los Angeles Angels 3-2 behind Vaughn Grissom's 2nd home run and Slade Cecconi's 4 shuttee innings with 7 strikeouts.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Will Warren: 5.2 IP, 6 K, 2 ER, 1 BB, 4 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Trent Grisham: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The New York Yankees defeated the Baltimore Orioles 6-2 behind Will Warren's 5.2 innings of work, striking out 6, and Trent Grisham's 3 RBIs, including a 3-run homer.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Luis Mey: 2.0 IP, 5 K, 1 ER, 1 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Daylen Lile: 3 H, 2 HR, 4 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Cincinnati Reds 10-4 behind Daylen Lile's 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs, and Luis Mey's 2 scoreless innings with 5 strikeouts.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Paul Skenes: 8.0 IP, 10 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Nick Gonzales: 2 H, 0 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates edged the Colorado Rockies 3-1 behind Paul Skenes' 8 shutout innings with 10 strikeouts and Nick Gonzales' 2-hit, 1-RBI performance.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Brayan Bello: 6.1 IP, 5 K, 1 ER, 1 BB, 4 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Kyle Schwarber: 1 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies edged the Boston Red Sox 2-1 behind Kyle Schwarber's solo homer and Brayan Bello's 6.1 innings of one-run relief.

all_games.game: Tampa Bay Rays @ Toronto Blue Jays
all_games.top_pitching_line: Shane McClanahan: 5.0 IP, 7 K, 0 ER, 1 BB, 1 H

all_games.summary: Tampa Bay Rays win 7-6 behind Shane McClanahan's 5 scoreless innings and Ryan Vilade's 2 hits, including a home run.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Freddy Peralta: 6.0 IP, 7 K, 2 ER, 1 BB, 7 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Dillon Dingler: 1 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The New York Mets dominated the Detroit Tigers 10-2 behind a strong outing from Freddy Peralta and a key home run from Dillon Dingler.

all_games.top_batting_line: Mike Yastrzemski: 2 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 2 AB
all_games.summary: The Atlanta Braves defeated the Chicago Cubs 5-2 behind a strong outing from Didier Fuentes and key hits from Matt Olson and Mike Yastrzemski.

all_games.game: Kansas City Royals @ Chicago White Sox

all_games.summary: The Chicago White Sox edged the Kansas City Royals 6-5, behind Chase Meidroth's 3 RBI and a 3-run homer from Derek Hill.

all_games.summary: The Minnesota Twins shut out the Miami Marlins 3-0 behind Bailey Ober's 9-inning performance, with Ryan Jeffers hitting a 2-RBI home run.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Yuki Matsui: 2.0 IP, 3 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 1 H

all_games.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers outlasted the San Diego Padres 6-4, behind a strong outing from Yuki Matsui and Miguel Andujar's 2-hit performance, including a 2-RBI home run.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Brandon Pfaadt: 3.0 IP, 5 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 2 H

all_games.summary: The Texas Rangers outlasted the Arizona Diamondbacks 7-4 behind strong pitching and key hits, including Ildemaro Vargas' 2-for-4 performance with a home run and two RBIs.

all_games.summary: The Seattle Mariners dominated the Houston Astros 10-2 behind Bryan Woo's 6 shutout innings and Randy Arozarena's 4-hit, 3-RBI performance.

all_games.top_pitching_line: JoJo Romero: 1.0 IP, 2 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 0 H

all_games.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals edged the Athletics 6-4, led by Shea Langeliers' 2-hit, 3-RBI performance, including his 12th home run.

all_games.game: San Francisco Giants @ Los Angeles Dodgers
all_games.top_pitching_line: Sam Hentges: 1.0 IP, 2 K, 0 ER, 2 BB, 1 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Eric Haase: 2 H, 2 HR, 2 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The San Francisco Giants defeated the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-2 behind Eric Haase's 2 home runs and 2 RBIs, and a strong outing from Sam Hentges.
